I.title: Phase I: Exploitation
I.label: Exploitation
I.tip: Pure aggression. No palate resets yet — Fatigue is still low.

II.title: Phase II: Maintenance
II.label: Maintenance
II.tip: Insert kimchi every {{kappa}} meat portions. Reorder before finishing current batch.

III.title: Phase III: Graceful Exit
III.label: Graceful Exit
III.tip: Monitor marginal utility. Stop when next piece costs more than it returns.
